headline: Is It Time To Reassess Zoetis (ZTS) After A 1-Year Share Price Slide?
summary: This article examines whether Zoetis, trading at around US$119, is offering value or still pricing in high expectations, by looking at what recent figures and checks indicate about the stock. Zoetis shares closed at US$119.04. The stock has declined 0.8% over 7 days, 2.2% over 30 days, 5.5% year to date and 18.8% over 1 year, which may have some investors reassessing the balance between risk and opportunity. Recent coverage has focused on Zoetis as a large player in animal health and on how...
